headline: 1 High-Flying Stock Worth Your Attention and 2 We Avoid
summary: "You get what you pay for" often applies to expensive stocks with best-in-class business models and execution. While their quality can sometimes justify the premium, they typically experience elevated volatility during market downturns when expectations change.

raw.headline: 1 High-Flying Stock Worth Your Attention and 2 We Avoid
raw.summary: "You get what you pay for" often applies to expensive stocks with best-in-class business models and execution. While their quality can sometimes justify the premium, they typically experience elevated volatility during market downturns when expectations change.

headline: Guggenheim Maintains Buy on Live Nation Entertainment, Raises Price Target to $192
summary: Guggenheim  analyst Curry Baker   maintains Live Nation Entertainment (NYSE:LYV) with a Buy and raises the price target from $180 to $192.
